comment: Absolutely love this coat! The fit is perfect and the quality is outstanding. Worth every penny.
Great sweater but runs a bit small. Wish there were more color options available.
This bag is everything I wanted. Clean design, durable materials, and it fits my laptop perfectly!
The fit was really off. Too tight in the thighs and too loose at the waist. Had to return.
Incredibly soft and luxurious. Perfect gift for my sister. She loved it!
Decent quality for the price but they shrank significantly after first wash. Size up!
Beautiful boots but the sizing is inconsistent. Left boot fits perfectly, right is tight.
The quality is exceptional. The color is exactly as shown online. Fast shipping too!
These pilled after ONE wear. Very disappointed. The fabric quality is terrible.
Love the style and fit. Only complaint is the lining feels cheap compared to the exterior fabric.
Perfect weight for layering. The craftsmanship is excellent. Will buy in other colors.
Pretty dress but wrinkles terribly. Needs ironing after every wear which is annoying.
Best purchase this year! Functional, stylish, and the leather quality is top-notch.
The waistband elastic broke after 3 washes. Not durable at all for the price.
Great fit and professional look. Wish they offered more inseam length options.
Absolutely worth the investment. Incredibly soft and the fit is flattering.
Comfortable but the white canvas stains very easily. Hard to keep clean.
This coat is stunning! Heavy, warm, and the cut is very flattering. Highly recommend.
The fabric is see-through. Not suitable to wear alone. Should have been disclosed.
Good quality leather and classic design. The buckle feels a bit light though.
Gorgeous skirt! The drape is beautiful and it's incredibly comfortable to wear all day.
Love the vintage wash and fit. Buttons could be more secure - one fell off already.
Best athletic socks I've owned. No slipping, great cushioning, and they don't smell!
Beautiful bag but smaller than expected. Should have better size photos online.
Great summer shirt. Breathable and stylish. Runs large so size down.
Perfect accessory! Quality construction and it holds its shape beautifully.
The print started cracking after 2 washes. Poor quality for a $35 shirt.
Extremely comfortable right out of the box. No break-in period needed. Love them!
Great compression and they stay in place. Wish there were pockets!
Warm but the material is itchy. Can't wear it without a headache.
Impeccable tailoring! Fits like it was custom-made. Professional and stylish.
Good quality and comfortable. Color faded slightly after multiple washes.
Straps broke on the first wear. Terrible quality control. Requesting refund.
Flowy, comfortable, and perfect for summer events. Got so many compliments!
Sleek design and good leather. Wish it had more card slots though.
Soft, warm, and doesn't make my head itchy like other beanies. Perfect!
Decent shirt but the collar doesn't hold its shape after washing.
Incredibly functional with lots of compartments. Durable and water-resistant!
The elastic waistband is too tight. Uncomfortable to sleep in.
Perfect summer blazer. Lightweight and breathable. Could use better lining.
